name: ai-ethics
description: Responsible AI development and ethical considerations. Use when evaluating
capabilities: Evaluate AI models for bias across different demographic groups
Implement fairness metrics including demographic parity and equalized odds
Conduct ethical impact assessments for AI systems
Ensure compliance with EU AI Act and similar regulations
Create model cards and transparency documentation
author: Joseph OBrien
securitySummary: This is a pure prompt-based documentation skill with no code execution capabilities. The SKILL.md file contains only informational content about AI ethics principles, bias detection, governance frameworks, and regulatory compliance. No network calls, filesystem access, or command execution patterns were detected in the actual content.
valueStatement: AI systems can perpetuate bias and cause harm without proper ethical safeguards. This skill provides comprehensive guidance for implementing fairness measures, detecting bias, ensuring regulatory compliance, and building trustworthy AI systems.
userTitle: Apply AI ethics principles to development
limitations: Does not execute code or access external systems
Provides guidance only, not automated bias detection tools
Does not replace human ethics review boards
References external frameworks but does not provide legal advice

useCases.title: Build Fair Models
useCases.description: Apply bias detection and mitigation techniques during model development lifecycle to prevent discriminatory outcomes.

useCases.title: Assess AI Impact
useCases.description: Conduct ethical impact assessments before deploying AI features to identify potential harms to users and stakeholders.

useCases.title: Meet Regulatory Requirements
useCases.description: Document AI systems according to EU AI Act requirements and prepare for audits and certification processes.

promptTemplates.title: Check for Bias
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the AI Ethics skill to evaluate this AI model for potential bias. What types of bias should I look for? What fairness metrics apply?

promptTemplates.title: Assess Fairness
promptTemplates.prompt: Apply the AI Ethics skill to assess fairness for this classification model. How do I calculate demographic parity and equalized odds across protected groups?

promptTemplates.title: Design Oversight
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the AI Ethics skill to design a human-in-the-loop oversight system for high-stakes AI decisions. What patterns and escalation paths should I implement?

promptTemplates.title: Ensure Compliance
promptTemplates.prompt: Apply the AI Ethics skill to ensure this AI system complies with the EU AI Act. What documentation and risk assessment requirements apply?

bestPractices: Apply bias detection throughout the ML lifecycle from data collection to model deployment and monitoring
Use multiple fairness metrics as different metrics can conflict and no single metric captures all fairness aspects
Document all ethical considerations, limitations, and stakeholder impact assessments in model cards
antiPatterns: Assuming high overall accuracy means the model is fair across all demographic groups
Using a single protected attribute for fairness checks without considering intersectionality
Deploying high-stakes AI systems without human oversight or override capabilities

faq.question: Does this skill work with all AI frameworks?
faq.answer: Yes. The ethics principles apply universally regardless of the ML framework or model type being used.

faq.question: What fairness metrics does the skill recommend?
faq.answer: It covers demographic parity, equalized odds, predictive parity, and individual fairness with counterfactual analysis.

faq.question: How does this integrate with other skills?
faq.answer: Use with machine-learning for model development, testing for bias testing, and documentation for model cards.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: This is a prompt-based skill with no code execution. No data leaves your system and no external calls are made.

faq.question: Why is my model showing high accuracy but failing fairness checks?
faq.answer: High overall accuracy can mask disparate impact. Check performance metrics separately for each demographic group.

faq.question: How is this different from general AI guidelines?
faq.answer: This skill provides specific, actionable frameworks for bias mitigation, governance, and regulatory compliance.
